discovery.name: PO_TEMPLATE
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT bu.bu_name PRC_BU, bu.bu_id BUID, ph.agent_id AGENTID, (SELECT MAX(pn.full_name) FROM per_person_names_f pn WHERE pn.person_id=ph.agent_id AND pn.name_type='GLOBAL') AGENT, (SELECT MAX(pea.email_address) FROM per_email_addresses pea WHERE pea.person_id=ph.agent_id) AGENTEMAIL, (SELECT MAX(le.name) FROM xle_entity_profiles le WHERE le.legal_entity_id=ph.soldto_le_id) LE, sv.vendor_name VNAME, sv.segment1 VNUM, ss.vendor_site_code SITE, ph.currency_code CUR, (SELECT loc.location_code FROM hr_locations_all loc WHERE loc.location_id=pll.ship_to_location_id) SHIPLOC FROM po_headers_all ph JOIN fun_all_business_units_v bu ON bu.bu_id=ph.prc_bu_id JOIN po_line_locations_all pll ON pll.po_header_id=ph.po_header_id JOIN poz_suppliers_v sv ON sv.vendor_id=ph.vendor_id JOIN poz_supplier_sites_all_m ss ON ss.vendor_site_id=ph.vendor_site_id WHERE ph.type_lookup_code='STANDARD' AND ph.prc_bu_id IS NOT NULL AND bu.primary_ledger_id IS NOT NULL AND pll.ship_to_location_id IS NOT NULL AND ph.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND ph.soldto_le_id IS NOT NULL AND NVL(ss.inactive_date,SYSDATE+1)>SYSDATE AND REGEXP_LIKE(sv.segment1,'^[0-9]+$') AND sv.vendor_name NOT LIKE '%RT %' AND sv.vendor_name NOT LIKE '%RT-%' ORDER BY DECODE(bu.bu_name,'US1 Business Unit',0,1), ph.po_header_id DESC) WHERE ROWNUM=1

discovery.name: PO_LINE_REF
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT plt.line_type LINE_TYPE, (SELECT cat.category_name FROM egp_categories_vl cat WHERE cat.category_id=l.category_id) CATEGORY, (SELECT loc.location_code FROM hr_locations_all loc WHERE loc.location_id=pd.deliver_to_location_id) DELIVERLOC, g.segment1 S1, g.segment2 S2, g.segment3 S3, g.segment4 S4, g.segment5 S5, g.segment6 S6 FROM po_headers_all ph JOIN po_lines_all l ON l.po_header_id=ph.po_header_id JOIN po_line_types_vl plt ON plt.line_type_id=l.line_type_id JOIN po_line_locations_all pll ON pll.po_line_id=l.po_line_id JOIN po_distributions_all pd ON pd.line_location_id=pll.line_location_id JOIN gl_code_combinations g ON g.code_combination_id=pd.code_combination_id WHERE ph.prc_bu_id=${BU_ID} AND ph.type_lookup_code='STANDARD' AND l.category_id IS NOT NULL AND pd.deliver_to_location_id IS NOT NULL AND pd.destination_type_code='EXPENSE' AND g.enabled_flag='Y' AND g.detail_posting_allowed_flag='Y' AND NVL(g.end_date_active,SYSDATE+1)>SYSDATE AND plt.line_type='Goods' ORDER BY ph.po_header_id DESC) WHERE ROWNUM=1

base_read.sql: SELECT segment1 AS PO_NUMBER, po_header_id AS PO_HEADER_ID, document_status AS DOCUMENT_STATUS FROM po_headers_all WHERE segment1 LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-PO-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT h.document_num AS PO_NUMBER, h.interface_header_id AS INTERFACE_HEADER_ID, h.process_code AS PROCESS_CODE, (SELECT LISTAGG(e.column_name || '=' || e.column_value || ': ' || e.error_message, ' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e.creation_date) FROM po_interface_errors e WHERE e.interface_header_id = h.interface_header_id) AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM po_headers_interface h WHERE h.load_request_id = :LRID
